name: OneTrust
description: OneTrust — privacy, GRC & third-party risk management. Imports OneTrust policies + documents/evidence into the XORCISM controlled-document register (XCOMPLIANCE.DOCUMENT). Offline: a JSON export. Live: set ONETRUST_BASE (https://<tenant>.onetrust.com) + ONETRUST_API_TOKEN (Bearer). Tool: https://www.onetrust.com.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline JSON export of OneTrust policies/documents.

parameters.name: base
parameters.help: OneTrust tenant base URL (https://<tenant>.onetrust.com). Overrides ONETRUST_BASE. Live needs ONETRUST_API_TOKEN.
